Index.title: Pray for Israel
Index.description: Take part in a 24/7 global prayer movement for Israel. Pray silently right now, and watch your country light up on the live map.
Index.remindMeDaily: Remind me daily to pray for Israel
Index.motto: “They bring to you pure oil of pressed olives for the light, to make the lamps burn continually.” (Leviticus 24:2–3)
